method: Extracted verbatim from docs/ECONOMIC_ML_ALPHA_V1.md and docs/FRONTIER_DISCOVERY_AUDIT_V1.md (plus docs/FRONTIER_SIGNAL_HYPOTHESES.md, docs/PILOT_TELEMETRY_CONTRACT.md). No new judgement added in this phase.
canonical_kpi: sla_safe_goodput_per_dollar = (output_tokens if sla_met else 0) / (gpu_cost + energy_cost + migration_cost + cold_start_cost - cache_value)

cold_start.kpi_path: cold_start_cost (denominator) up; sla_met (numerator) down when load adds to e2e
cold_start.what_is_missing: server-class model_load_duration_s per (model, GPU, storage tier); weight_transfer_latency_s; graph_capture_latency_s; compile_latency_s; warmup_duration_s; scale_from_zero_delay_s
cold_start.best_public_signal_v1: ejhusom single-machine consumer-Ollama load_duration_ns (not server-class, not in analysis corpus); Alibaba GenAI 2026 base-model cold-start medians (aggregate, no request->GPU join)

model_load_duration.note: Subcase of cold_start; the single measurable field that makes cold-start measurable rather than inferred (PILOT_TELEMETRY_CONTRACT model_load_start/model_load_end).

migration.kpi_path: migration_cost (denominator) up; cache_value down; sla_met down via reroute
migration.what_is_missing: per-migration cache_loss_pct (KV/prefix block survival); reroute_latency_s; prefix_reuse_destruction; warmup_after_migration_s; traffic_shift_instability; migration_veto_label
migration.best_public_signal_v1: CC-traces (semianalysisai) migration_or_cache_loss_proxy via KV block-hash loss — a PROXY, NOT realized as a per-migration label in any public serving trace

cache_loss.kpi_path: migration_cost up; cache_value down; ttft up via re-prefill
cache_loss.what_is_missing: per-migration / per-eviction KV block-hash survival realized as cache_loss_pct in overlay rows
cache_loss.best_public_signal_v1: CC-traces KV block-hash loss proxy (not realized); CARA KV eviction features

cache_hit.what_is_missing: real per-request cache_hit boolean across >1 serving stack; cross-dataset generalization for the shadow-ready cache_reuse_pct model (SwissAI-only)
cache_hit.best_public_signal_v1: eth-easl swissai-serving-trace cache_reuse_pct (shadow-ready, SINGLE-DATASET caveat); Isabella5 sglang-seglen request shapes (no telemetry)

warm_pool.kpi_path: trade-off: idle gpu_cost vs avoided cold_start_cost
warm_pool.what_is_missing: warm_pool_occupancy time-series; first-token timing after warm vs cold

queue_state.kpi_path: queue_wait adds to e2e -> sla_met down (largest controllable SLA risk)
queue_state.what_is_missing: per-request serving-layer enqueue/dequeue timestamps with queue_depth time-series evolution and replica saturation; current public data is JOB-level not serving-request-level
queue_state.best_public_signal_v1: Qinghao/AcmeTrace job-level queue_wait; CARA (asdwb) queue features; closest realized proxy is the ML Alpha v1 TTFT signal

autoscaling.kpi_path: scale-up too late -> sla_met down + cold_start_cost up; scale-down churn -> re-cold-start
autoscaling.what_is_missing: scale_up_latency_s; scale_down_churn; warm_pool_occupancy; oscillation_frequency; HPA/Knative scale event log with timing
autoscaling.best_public_signal_v1: Google Cluster/Borg job-level schedule/evict events (proxy only); NONE for inference autoscaling

timeout_or_failure_risk.kpi_path: request abandoned -> goodput->0 (biggest single numerator swing)
timeout_or_failure_risk.best_public_signal_v1: Optimum/Odyn/llmperf-bedrock error_rate (aggregate); AcmeTrace job-level FAILED/TIMEOUT states (proxy, not per-serving-request)

routing_instability.kpi_path: oscillation -> repeated migration penalties; proxy bottleneck -> e2e up
routing_instability.what_is_missing: routing decision log; traffic-shift timestamps; per-replica in-flight counts

replica_contention.kpi_path: concurrency collapse -> tail blow-up -> sla_met down

tail_latency_amplification.kpi_path: p95/p99 inflation -> tail breaks SLA -> sla_met down
tail_latency_amplification.what_is_missing: per-request latency distribution under load with the upstream cause (queue/contention/migration) attributed
tail_latency_amplification.best_public_signal_v1: CARA per-request latency; Optimum benchmark latency; llmperf-bedrock TTFT/TPOT (measured but without upstream-cause attribution)

v1_per_category_status_matrix.queueing: partial / trainable as proxy (AcmeTrace job-level, CARA features)
v1_per_category_status_matrix.memory_pressure: partial->good (Optimum peak_vram realized/shadow-ready; CARA KV evictions)

v1_headline: Public HF datasets do not contain the missing economic-alpha signals. The highest-leverage un-forecasted signals (timeout, cold-start, migration, autoscaling) have the least public data. Next move per v1 = pilot telemetry + cross-dataset hardening of the two shadow-ready models (cache_reuse_pct, peak_vram_gb).
v2_mission: Search the BROADER systems-research ecosystem (conference artifacts, supplemental materials, GitHub releases, Zenodo archives, benchmark packages, observability repositories) for these missing signals. Do not stop after Hugging Face.
